creator: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
text:
> -----Original Message-----
> From: Edwin Groothuis [mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org] 
> Sent: Wednesday, July 04, 2007 4:10 PM
> To: glarkin@sourcehosting.net
> Subject: Re: ports/114304: Update port: www/zend-framework to 
> version 1.0.0
> 
> Maintainer of www/zend-framework,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/114304 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a 
> bug fix you agree on, reply to this email stating that you 
> approve the patch and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/114304
> 
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 

Hi Edwin,

I would like to cancel this PR.

I submitted a maintainer update ZF 1.0.0rc3 on June 29th
(http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=114137), and it was committed on
June 30th, and I had planned to do another update for ZF 1.0.0, as soon as
it was available.

I would prefer to submit a patch against the existing port, since this PR
contains a pkg-plist file that doesn't use DATADIR.  I'll take a look at the
PR anyway to see if there are other changes that would be useful, and I'll
create a new PR shortly.

Regards,
Greg Larkin
SourceHosting.net, LLC
